jackie

Work

Connect

For the past 10 years, I've been turning complex ideas into interactable stuff.

I'm a product designer
but I'm also…

an ai-powered coder

a digital artist

a mentor

a martial artist

a cautious skateboarder

a loving husband and father

Senior level

What fuels my soul

  • Spending time in nature with my small family

  • Connecting with people

  • Creating things

Stuff that I'll nerd out on

  • TTRPG - Mouse guard RPG is my jam

  • Aeropress - inverted method is overrated

  • Concept Art - Craig Mullins is my hero

(that are not product design)

What gives me energy

  • Working closely with a tight-knit team

  • Shipping cool things

  • Contributing to a better world
